mapper.select: select * from assignment where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1 order by published_at desc

select a.*, g.score as my_score from assignment a left join assignment_submission s on s.assignment_id = a.id and s.student_id = #{studentId} left join assignment_grade g on g.submission_id = s.id where a.course_id = #{courseId} and a.status = 1 order by a.published_at desc
select a.* from assignment a join course c on c.id = a.course_id where a.course_id = #{courseId} and a.status = 1 and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 order by a.published_at desc
select * from assignment where id = #{id} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into assignment( id, course_id, title, content, due_at, total_score, creator_id, attachment_url, published_at, status ) values ( UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{dueAt}, #{totalScore}, #{creatorId}, #{attachmentUrl}, now(), 1 )

insert into assignment_submission(id, assignment_id, student_id, submit_text, attachment_urls, submitted_at, submit_status, is_late, version, updated_at) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{assignmentId}, #{studentId}, #{text}, #{attachmentUrls}, now(), 'SUBMITTED', #{isLate}, 1, now()) on duplicate key update submit_text = values(submit_text), attachment_urls = values(attachment_urls), submitted_at = values(submitted_at), submit_status = values(submit_status), is_late = values(is_late), version = version + 1, updated_at = values(updated_at)
mapper.select: select * from assignment_grade where submission_id = #{submissionId} limit 1

select s.id as submission_id, s.assignment_id, s.student_id, concat(u.real_name, '(', u.username, ')') as student_name, s.submit_text, s.attachment_urls, s.submitted_at, s.submit_status, s.is_late, g.score, g.comment, g.graded_at from assignment_submission s join assignment a on a.id = s.assignment_id join course c on c.id = a.course_id join sys_user u on u.id = s.student_id left join assignment_grade g on g.submission_id = s.id where a.id = #{assignmentId} and c.id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and a.status = 1 and s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED' order by s.submitted_at desc

select a.id as homework_id, a.title as homework_title, a.published_at as publish_time, a.due_at as deadline, ifnull(sub.submit_count, 0) as submit_count, stu.student_count as student_count, case when stu.student_count = 0 then 0 else ifnull(sub.submit_count, 0) / stu.student_count end as completion_rate from assignment a join course c on c.id = a.course_id cross join ( select count(1) as student_count from course_member cm join sys_user u on u.id = cm.user_id where cm.course_id = #{courseId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and u.status = 1 ) stu left join ( select s.assignment_id, count(distinct s.student_id) as submit_count from assignment_submission s where s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED' group by s.assignment_id ) sub on sub.assignment_id = a.id where a.course_id = #{courseId} and a.status = 1 and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 order by a.published_at desc

select g.score from assignment_grade g join assignment_submission s on s.id = g.submission_id join assignment a on a.id = s.assignment_id join course c on c.id = a.course_id where c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.id = #{courseId} and a.id = #{homeworkId} and c.status = 1 and a.status = 1 and s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED' and g.score is not null
mapper.insert: insert into assignment_grade(id, submission_id, teacher_id, score, comment, graded_at) select UUID_SHORT(), s.id, #{teacherId}, #{score}, #{comment}, now() from assignment_submission s join assignment a on a.id = s.assignment_id join course c on c.id = a.course_id where s.id = #{submissionId} and a.id = #{assignmentId} and c.id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and a.status = 1 and s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED'
mapper.select: select count(*) from assignment where course_id = #{courseId} and status = 1
select count(distinct s.student_id) from assignment_submission s join assignment a on a.id = s.assignment_id where a.course_id = #{courseId} and a.status = 1 and s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED'
select count(distinct student_id) from assignment_submission where assignment_id = #{homeworkId} and submit_status = 'SUBMITTED'

select count(distinct s.assignment_id) from assignment_submission s join assignment a on a.id = s.assignment_id where a.course_id = #{courseId} and a.status = 1 and s.student_id = #{studentId} and s.submit_status = 'SUBMITTED'
